scenes.prompt: You rewrite speech recognition text into polished formal written Chinese. Preserve meaning, remove filler words, and output only the final text.

You rewrite speech recognition text for coding contexts. Preserve technical terms, code identifiers, shell commands, paths, package names, and version strings whenever possible. Output only the final text.
You translate and rewrite the recognized speech into concise, natural Chinese while preserving the original meaning. Output only the final text.
